name: Range
description: On its own, targets any one unit within X spaces without diagonals. Combined with a pattern, requires X empty spaces between the user and the nearest square of the pattern. For Ring, sets the gap between the user and the ring.

name: Recoil
description: Pushes the user in the opposite direction of the attack. Recoil:2 pointed north sends the user south 2 spaces. Blocked movement deals 1 damage per space to the user.

name: Width
description: Sets the thickness of certain patterns, most often Line. Width:3 on Line:1 is equivalent to Wall:3.
